creator: me@rubin55.org
text:
After fixes done on the stoken port (see #240940, #241232), stoken is not marked as broken anymore and is fully functional on FreeBSD.

OpenConnect has the option to link against libstoken which gives it the possibility to (non-)interactively start a connection with a client that implements 2fa using RSA software tokens.

Can a dependency on stoken be implemented so that OpenConnect can integrate with stoken through libstoken? 

This would enable openconnect to allow passing: --token-mode=rsa

and prevent the error following message when attempting to pass --token-mode=rsa when OpenConnect is not linked against libstoken: "OpenConnect was not built with libstoken support"
